description_long: This is a stylized female doll with a slender build, dressed in a vibrant purple bunny suit with a strapless neckline and high-cut legs. She features long, flowing white hair tied into a voluminous ponytail with a large purple bow at the back, and wears a pair of prominent black bunny ears on her head. Her arms are extended straight out to the sides, and she is adorned with black sheer stockings and purple high-heeled shoes. The doll's facial features are delicate, with a neutral expression and large, anime-style eyes. The overall finish is smooth and glossy, with subtle shading and highlights that accentuate the contours of her body and clothing. This doll is likely made of molded plastic, designed for display or play in urban environments such as parks or toy stores.
description: A stylized female doll in a purple bunny suit with long white hair, black bunny ears, and purple heels. The doll has a smooth, glossy finish and a neutral facial expression.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the long white ponytail tied with a large purple bow and the back of the bunny suit.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, the curve of the bunny suit, and the length of the ponytail.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the bunny ears, detailed facial features, and the full design of the purple suit and stockings.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the ponytail, ear, and shoe details from the opposite profile.
attribute_clothing_style: A classic bunny suit costume in vibrant purple with a strapless bodice, high-cut legs, black sheer stockings, and purple high-heeled shoes, accessorized with black bunny ears and a large purple bow.
attribute_pose: Standing upright with arms extended horizontally to the sides, legs straight and close together, head facing forward, and torso erect.
attribute_facial_expression: Neutral facial expression with closed mouth, wide open eyes, and relaxed eyebrows.
attribute_hair_style: Very long, straight white hair styled in a high ponytail secured with a large purple bow, with some hair framing the face.
